text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital finishes strong in her<n>important
debut race.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: The base... is the peak...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The base is the peak... The very first<n>starting
gate... A distance not yet<n>grasped... Entangled
legs...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Splashes of perspiration. Blind with<n>adrenaline.
Quiet blankets the<n>cheering. Only the scoreboard is
visible.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The emotional weight of it all is<n>practically
unbearable! You get it,<n>right? Can you feel it?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... And here I am, smooshed inamong all these fresh young Umas asthey run with fervor thrust into everystep...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I underestimated how consuming the<n>debut race
would be! We're all<n>winners! All of us!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital appears thrilled to have<n>run
alongside so many other rookie<n>Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Still, today's race is just the very<n>beginning, right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
From this point forward, there'll be<n>loads of
Umamusume waiting for me,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, it can't get any better than this!<n>I've taken
my first step through the<n>gates of paradise! I've
made it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And now, the simping begins! I'll<n>simp on turf! I'll
simp on dirt! I'll simp<n>until I can simp no more!
Let's head<n>to the next one!
choice_data_list: On that note, what do you say to a turf race next?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh... right. Since today was dirt,<n>next up
should be turf...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Digitan! Pull it together! We<n>gotta think
about this more seriously.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... Today was way too intense<n>because it
was a debut race...<n>Because of that, the others
practically<n>shot across the track.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You know, I haven't quite had my fill<n>of watching
Umas play in the dirt! I'd<n>like a second helping of
it, please!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to gear up for the<n>Hyacinth
Stakes at the beginning of<n>next year.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Next year... That's kinda far off,<n>though. Guess
that just gives me<n>more time to run and prep...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's spend that time building karma<n>as well. After
all, I'd like to get to<n>know all the different types of
Umamusume more deeply. At arm's<n>length, of
course.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having just begun our journey into<n>the Twinkle
Series, we need to take<n>every opportunity to make
new<n>connections and increase our<n>knowledge as
we prepare for the<n>Hyacinth Stakes.
